title: Crafting Workshops — Star Wars FFG
description: Interactive crafting workshops for the Star Wars FFG system: lightsaber forge & recustom (compendium-driven hilts, 24 crystals, 17 attachments), Force alchemy (17 potion & talisman recipes with contextual advantage/triumph spending) and attachment tuning with the book-accurate mod difficulty escalation. The dice check comes first and its result decides the outcome. Fully bilingual English/French.
